title: WorstLandlord
description: A landlord on the NYC Public Advocate's Worst Landlord Watchlist — the office's flagship data product. Canonical schema reverse-engineered from the undocumented JSON endpoint landlordwatchlist.com/api/landlords, which returns ~99 ranked landlords. Each landlord is ranked on aggregate housing conditions across their portfolio (open HPD Housing Maintenance Code violations, DOB violations, evictions, tax liens). No public/documented API or Open Data twin exists under a Public Advocate label.

rank.description: Position on the Top 100 Worst Landlords list ('rank'); 1 = worst.

officer.description: Named principal / responsible officer registered with HPD ('officer').

buildings.description: Number of buildings in the landlord's portfolio ('buildings').

units.description: Number of residential units across the portfolio ('UNIT').

averageOpenViolations.description: Average open HPD Housing Maintenance Code violations per building, the primary ranking metric ('num_avg').

taxLiens.description: Number of tax liens across the portfolio ('tax_lien').

evictions.description: Number of evictions across the portfolio ('evictions').
